_readme: Watty's news interests. This is the steering wheel for the daily bulletin. To change what the morning job looks for, edit 'temporary_boosts' below (or just ask Claude — 'add camping gear news for a week'). 'standing_interests' are the always-on topics; leave them unless you want a permanent change. Dates are YYYY-MM-DD. 'freshness_days' = only accept stories newer than this many days.

standing_interests.note: Brand/family monitoring. Private — stripped from everything public.
Anything to do with Papua New Guinea (PNG) is always welcome — Bensbach, Lake Murray, Sepik, PNG black bass and barramundi, and notable PNG good news.
Strongly prefer SALTWATER species and barramundi. Saltwater fly-tying video recommendations are welcome — include the video link and a link_label.

temporary_boosts._example: This is a sample showing the format. Delete or replace it. 'category' is which section the stories land in; 'expires' is when this boost switches itself off.
